title: BetterFences
description: Replaces the stem of fences with the log they came from.
body:
Fences in minecraft, well, they look boring. With BetterFences, you can have Better Fences!

This mod replaces the stem of fences with the .json file of the wood type it came from. Simple.

Here's an example:

![An image of what the texture pack does](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6410bab61db645000f7886b3bb7d3f201735b9e5.jpeg)
